tables: Bihar BPSC Prosecution Officer Recruitment 2026 Exam Date

Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC)  has released the notification for the recruitment of Prosecution Officer under Home Department (Prosecution Directorate), Govt. of Bihar. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following BPSC Prosecution Officer Exam 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 27/02/2026 to 20/03/2026. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in BPSC Prosecution Officer under Home Department (Prosecution Directorate), Govt. of Bihar. Recruitment 2026.
Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) BPSC Prosecution Officer Recruitment 2026 BPSC APO Advt. No. : 13/2026 : Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 27/02/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 20/03/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 20/03/2026 Exam Date : 15/07/2026 Admit Card Available : Before Exam
Application Fee General / OBC/ Other State : 100/- SC / ST / PH : 100/- Female Candidate (Bihar Dom.) : 100/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online / Offline Fee Mode Only

BPSC Prosecution Officer Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/08/2026 Minimum Age : 21 Years Maximum Age : 37 Years for Male Maximum Age : 40 Years for Female Read the Notification for Age Relaxation in BPSC Prosecution Officer under Home Department (Prosecution Directorate), Govt. of Bihar. How to Fill BPSC Prosecution Officer Online Form 2026 Bihar Public Service Commission BPSC Are Issued Prosecution Officer under Home Department (Prosecution Directorate), Govt. of Bihar.  Recruitment Notification 2026 and Invited Online Application Form for the BPSC Bihar Prosecution Officer   Jobs 2026 Candidate Can Apply Online for 27/02/2026 to 20/03/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the BPSC Latest Prosecution Officer under Home Department (Prosecution Directorate), Govt. of Bihar. Application Form in Sarkari Result Recruitment Latest Job Section. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – ID, DOB Proof, Etc. Live Photo and Hindi / English Signature Required in BPSC APO Form 2025. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
